economy.macroSubtitle: Understanding the flow of money is essential for hegemonic achievements. In Victoria 3, your government rarely generates money out of thin air (except for Gold Minting). The economy is based on a closed cycle where Population, Jobs, Wages, and Consumption Expenditures dictate GDP growth.
economy.microSubtitle: Many achievements require becoming the largest producer of certain goods or building late-century armies. Knowing advanced production methods (PMs) by heart avoids vital resource shortages and bankruptcies in the interconnected market.
economy.pmTipDescription: Whenever you unlock a new technology that changes the production method, check the local tabs (F3 in-game). Changing everything at once without having the intermediate resources ready in your market will cause prices to skyrocket.

achievements.noResults: No achievements found with current filters.

guides.title: Core Nations & Strategies
guides.subtitle: These countries have the most exclusive achievements, thematic journals, and unique mechanics. Click any of them to read the complete Early Game and Late Game strategies to survive and thrive.
